title: Luna Self-Healing Playbook Record
description: One playbook per known failure class. Phase 5E foundation; the engine recommends only — it never executes commands. Operator approval is required to act on any safe_first_action.

failure_class.description: Free-form coarse category: import_error, syntax_error, supervisor_storm, queue_hygiene, model_capacity, control_loop_churn, gate_blocked, truthfulness, process_classification, external_service_down, ui_truthfulness, log_growth, supply_chain_risk, architecture_drift, etc.

tags.description: Lowercase tags used by the matcher to score against incoming text.

detection_signals.description: Natural-language phrases / log substrings the matcher will look for.

approval_tier_required.description: 0 read-only, 1 logs/reports, 2 edit-with-preview, 3 sandbox auto-edit, 4 trusted full-auto on allowlist, 5 emergency repair only.

source.description: Where this playbook came from: phase5e_seed, operator, learned_from_incident, etc.
